subcodes.title: Letter to Mulla Hasan Gawhar
subcodes.first_line: Ta. Ha. We did not send down the Book aforetime except  it was a memorial for Whomsoever He wills that he should believe in the verses of thy Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. طه ما نزلنا الکتاب من قبل الا نذکرة لمن شاء ان یوحی بآیات ربک و کان من الساجدین اقرء کتاب ربک لا مبدل فی حکمی و استغفر لامتک لتکونن من المفلحین
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital
